Built an **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, integrating LLM-powered tooling that cut planning cycle time by 39% and increased drill capacity by 21%—directly mirroring AI-feature ownership for patient-facing engagement surfaces.

Defined and tracked KPIs across the resilience program—including drill completion rates, recovery SLAs, and adoption metrics—using data-driven analysis to surface recurring failure patterns and prioritize roadmap improvements each quarter.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated CI/CD pipelines, accelerating the software **deployment cycle by 25%** and reducing manual toil that had been blocking consistent, reliable product releases.
